evidence: STALE_0DTE has 5 trades and $162.8, but breakout_long_no_0dte contributes only $71 over 2 trades with 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. VALID_0DTE remains the core edge and should be unaffected by no-0DTE profile tuning.
name: Stale No-0DTE Breakout Quality Box
risk: Sample size is tiny; stricter structure and RSI can remove positive fallback insurance or underpay the single cleaner expired/no-0DTE breakout pattern.
trigger: STALE_0DTE or EXPIRED_0DTE router selects breakout_long_no_0dte and the trade must rely on ES continuation rather than valid 0DTE option confirmation.
validation_metric: Fallback PnL/exposure improves versus 83.2 aggregate and 40.5 breakout stale slice, fallback worst MAE improves or stays flat, VALID_0DTE trades/PnL remain unchanged, total net profit stays >=98% of leader, and slow_12h remains 0.
